ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ovens" (
  "oven_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pizza oven model */,
  "internal_dimensions" TEXT /* Internal dimensions of the oven (e.g., diameter, size) */,
  "hearth_surface_area" TEXT /* Hearth surface area in square inches and centimeters */,
  "dome_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the dome (e.g., Igloo, Barrel) */,
  "vault_height" TEXT /* Height of the vault in inches and centimeters */,
  "door_height" TEXT /* Height of the door in inches and centimeters */,
  "door_width" TEXT /* Width of the door in inches and centimeters */,
  "flue_width" TEXT /* Width of the flue in inches and centimeters */,
  "foundation_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the foundation in inches and centimeters */,
  "pizza_capacity" TEXT /* Number of 10-inch pizzas the oven can accommodate */,
  "material" TEXT /* Materials used in the construction of the oven */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the oven uses */,
  "max_temperature" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature the oven can reach */,
  "cool_down_time" TEXT /* Time it takes for the oven to cool down from the maximum temperature */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the oven */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL to an image of the oven */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the oven */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the oven */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oven_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "oven_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated pizza oven model */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of units available in stock */,
  "quantity_on_order" INTEGER /* Number of units currently on order */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date for the next restock */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_oven_id FOREIGN KEY ("oven_id") REFERENCES ovens ("oven_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customizations" (
  "customization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customization request */,
  "oven_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pizza oven model being customized */,
  "customer_request" TEXT /* Description of the customer's request */,
  "additional_features" TEXT /* List of additional features requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the customization request was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the customization request */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date when the customized oven will be delivered */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated cost of the customization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customization request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customizations_oven_id FOREIGN KEY ("oven_id") REFERENCES ovens ("oven_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "oven_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pizza oven model sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the transaction */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date when the oven was delivered to the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_oven_id FOREIGN KEY ("oven_id") REFERENCES ovens ("oven_id")
)
